channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Don’t let Elon Musk’s crew at DOGE off the hook just because they’re Zoomers
item.description: Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) is ripping apart the federal government at the seams. They’ve decimated the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Thomson Reuters scores early win in AI copyright battles in the US
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Thomson Reuters has won an early battle in court over the question of fair use in artificial intelligence-related copyright cases.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Nvidia partners with cybersecurity vendors for real-time monitoring
item.description: Nvidia has partnered with leading cybersecurity firms to provide real-time security protection using its accelerator and networking hardware in combination with its AI software.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Grimes rips Elon Musk for using their 4-year-old son as ‘a prop’ in Trump appearances
item.description: MSNBC host Lawrence O'Donnell also said that the little boy's presence in an Oval Office press conference with Trump Tuesday was 'a power play' by the tech billionaire.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Federal health agencies restore webpages and datasets following judge's order
item.description: Federal health agencies have restored several webpages and datasets, following a judge’s order to bring back public access to information that had been removed to comply with a presidential executive order.
item.dc:creator: Mike Stobbe And Kasturi Pananjady, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Wes Anderson’s The Phoenician Scheme is arriving sooner than you think, and I'm hugely excited for Michael Cera’s cameo
item.description: We finally have a release date for Wes Anderson's next movie – here's what we know about The Phoenician Scheme so far.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft 365: A guide to the updates
item.description: Microsoft 365 (and Office 365) subscribers get more frequent software updates than those who have purchased Office without a subscription, which means subscribers have access to the latest features, security patches, and bug fixes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The low-code lessons CIOs can apply to agentic AI
item.description: As gen AI goes from being a chatbot you ask questions of, to tools you ask to achieve things — agentic AI is the slightly clumsy phrase for this approach — it’s becoming increasingly clear that gen AI is most useful when it’s most personalized.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: New US CIO appointments, February 2025
item.description: Movers & Shakers is where you can keep up with new CIO appointments and gain valuable insight into the job market and CIO hiring trends.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Dynamic web apps with HTMX, Python, and Django
item.description: Python is one of the most popular programming language today, in part due to its large ecosystem of tools for data science and AI applications. But Python is also a popular choice for developing web apps, particularly using the Django web framework.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The Turbulent Start of Lauren Sanchez: A Year of Controversy and Criticism
item.description: Lauren Sanchez faces criticism for her outfit choice at Trump's inauguration and Bezos' censored endorsement of Kamala Harris.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Paris AI Action Summit: US and UK refuse to sign accord
item.description: The escalating electricity demands of artificial intelligence systems are raising concerns about the technology’s sustainability — but that’s apparently of little concern to the governments of the US and the UK.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Esports Olympics to debut in Saudi Arabia later than expected in 2027
item.description: The International Olympic Committee says the first Olympic Esports Games will be hosted in Riyadh in 2027.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The cloud giants stumble
item.description: Recent financial results from the major cloud providers reveal a concerning trend in cloud adoption and growth. AWS reported just 13% growth in the final quarter of 2023, Microsoft Azure saw 19% growth, and Google Cloud achieved 26% growth—all below market expectations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: News influencers favored Trump over Harris during campaign, study finds
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Americans who followed news influencers during the presidential campaign were more likely to hear positive reports about Donald Trump than they were about Kamala Harris, a study has revealed.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Congress gets set to deal with artificial intelligence in health care
item.description: "AI is going to help kick in some of that load that the scientists and researchers do at the front end to quickly get a diagnosis," said Deema Tarazi. The post Congress gets set to deal with artificial intelligence in health care first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: What you need to know about Python 3.14’s faster interpreter
item.description: Python 3.14, due out later this year, is set to receive a new type of interpreter that can boost performance by up to 30% with no changes to existing code. The CPython 3.14 change log describes the feature as “a new type of interpreter based on tail calls.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Internet upgrade part of a move towards 400/800G connectivity
item.description: The industry transition to 400 Gigabit Ethernet networking took a big step forward this week when the world’s leading Internet exchange operator announced plans to upgrade its New York backbone to 400G.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tech companies raise more than $27 million to build infrastructure for kids online safety
item.description: A group of leading major technology companies including OpenAI and Discord have raised more than $27 million for a new initiative focused on building open-source tools to boost online safety for kids.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Your ‘new’ Seagate data center hard drive is likely a used one
item.description: A growing number of buyers have reported purchasing supposedly new Seagate data center-grade hard drives, only to discover that they had been previously used for thousands of hours.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Is your camera ticket a fake? Here’s how to tell
item.description: Red light camera tickets: Not liable to ID the driver; some are fishing expeditions. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you fight back against tricky fake tickets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GitHub Copilot previews agent mode
item.description: GitHub has added new capabilities to its GitHub Copilot AI-powered coding assistant, including a preview of a new agent mode capable of iterating on its own code. The company also announced the general availability of Copilot Edits in Visual Studio Code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI looks across US for sites to build its Trump-backed Stargate AI data centers
item.description: OpenAI is scouring the U.S. for sites to build a network of huge data centers to power its artificial intelligence technology, expanding beyond a flagship Texas location and looking across 16 states to accelerate the Stargate project championed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Oracle maintains hold on JavaScript trademark
item.description: Oracle, under external pressure to yield control over the JavaScript trademark, has instead filed a motion for dismissal of part of a petition to cancel the trademark.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google scraps its diversity hiring goals as it complies with Trump's new government contractor rules
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is scrapping some of its diversity hiring targets, joining a lengthening list of U.S. companies that have abandoned or scaled back their diversity, equity and inclusion programs.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
